focusPoints.label: How she’s landing in team rituals now
focusPoints.reason: Whether her engagement drop is tied to the decision she was passed over, or just a temporary dip in energy—worth clarifying what changed for her day to day.

focusPoints.label: The readout on why she wasn’t selected
focusPoints.reason: Whether she got a concrete, direct explanation for the gap and what she thinks the bar is—so you can confirm the facts and close any unanswered questions.

focusPoints.label: Whether mentoring is strategic growth work
focusPoints.reason: What she wants to build next may be showing up through mentoring, or she may be using it to park energy after feeling blocked—worth clarifying which it is and what outcomes she wants from it.

focusPoints.label: What “next-level” looks like for her
focusPoints.reason: What she needs to see to feel confident about the next step—scope, expectations, and the specific bar for Principal-to-next—so her plan is actionable rather than abstract.

name: Maria
notes: Maria was passed over last cycle and has not raised it directly, but her engagement in team rituals has dropped. I suspect she may still be carrying unanswered questions about the decision. I need to clarify whether she got a concrete readout on the gap and whether she wants that now. I also want to understand if her mentoring program is strategic growth work or a place she is parking energy after feeling blocked in the main path.
